My 3 main takeaways on AIML Engineering roles :
1. AIML Engineering is fast-moving, Iterative, and uncertain

Unlike traditional software engineering (deterministic, predictable), AIML work is highly experimental and full of unknowns. Success often depends on iteration speed, data quality, evaluation methods, and infrastructure, not just clever algorithms. The field evolves rapidly.

2. The role is highly cross-functional AIML engineers collaborate with: Data engineers (pipelines, lineage) DevOpsMLOps teams (infra, deployment) ProductBackend teams (integration, performance) Research scientists (model development, evaluation)
3. Success depends on data quality, edge cases, and evaluation The hard part of AIML engineering is not the model its curating, labeling, cleaning, and understanding data.
